channel.title: Posts on Peter Gao
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Peter Gao

item.title: Playing with d3 and blogdown
item.description: .bar { fill: steelblue; } .bar:hover { fill: orange; } library("jsonlite") cat( paste( '<script> var data = ',toJSON(cars),'; </script>' , sep="") ) var data = [{"speed":4,"dist":2},{"speed":4,"dist":10},{"speed":7,"dist":4},{"speed":7,"dist":22},{"speed":8,"dist":16},{"speed":9,"dist":10},{"speed":10,"dist":18},{"speed":10,"dist":26},{"speed":10,"dist":34},{"speed":11,"dist":17},{"speed":11,"dist":28},{"speed":12,"dist":14},{"speed":12,"dist":20},{"speed":12,"dist":24},{"speed":12,"dist":28},{"speed":13,"dist":26},{"speed":13,"dist":34},{"speed":13,"dist":34},{"speed":13,"dist":46},{"speed":14,"dist":26},{"speed":14,"dist":36},{"speed":14,"dist":60},{"speed":14,"dist":80},{"speed":15,"dist":20},{"speed":15,"dist":26},{"speed":15,"dist":54},{"speed":16,"dist":32},{"speed":16,"dist":40},{"speed":17,"dist":32},{"speed":17,"dist":40},{"speed":17,"dist":50},{"speed":18,"dist":42},{"speed":18,"dist":56},{"speed":18,"dist":76},{"speed":18,"dist":84},{"speed":19,"dist":36},{"speed":19,"dist":46},{"speed":19,"dist":68},{"speed":20,"dist":32},{"speed":20,"dist":48},{"speed":20,"dist":52},{"speed":20,"dist":56},{"speed":20,"dist":64},{"speed":22,"dist":66},{"speed":23,"dist":54},{"speed":24,"dist":70},{"speed":24,"dist":92},{"speed":24,"dist":93},{"speed":24,"dist":120},{"speed":25,"dist":85}]; experimenting with d3 (from http://bl.ocks.org/alexsb/8565055) var data = [150, 230, 180, 90]; var svg = d3.select("body") .append("svg") .attr("width", 300) .attr("height", 200); svg.selectAll(".bar") .data(data) .enter() .append("rect") .attr({ class : "bar", width : function(d) {return d;}, height: "40", y : function(d, i) {return i*50 + 10;}, x : "10" }); var data = [150, 230, 180, 90]; var svg = d3.
